overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage in a gothic-style grand hall with ornate architecture, featuring a character in dark robes observing NPCs walking through a candle-lit interior space. The scene showcases detailed stone masonry, a central statue, and atmospheric lighting from floating candles.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a grand gothic hall with a central marble statue and floating candles providing warm light. The character stands observing as a group of students in dark robes walks through the hall from the far end toward the camera, passing by on the right side.

character turns back to face the center of the hall

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left to focus on the gothic archway and balcony railing on the left side of the hall. The central statue and candles exit the frame as the character observes the side architecture. A single student walks past in the background during this quieter moment.

events.description: brief pan to the left to check the side area before returning to center
increased crowd density as multiple groups of students converge and pass through the hall

agents.ego_description: facing the center of the hall, observing the continuous flow of students passing through in various directions

group of lit candles floating in mid-air
tall stone pillar supporting the vaulted ceiling

segments.scene_description: The view returns to the center of the grand hall, with the central statue and floating candles visible again. The character observes a steady stream of students walking through the space. Around the 32-second mark, the camera briefly pans left before returning to center, and the crowd density increases significantly toward the end of the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand gothic hall that shifts from a focused observation of a few individuals to a wide view of a bustling crowd. It begins centered on a marble statue illuminated by floating candles as a small group of students in dark robes walks past on the right. The camera then pans left to emphasize the ornate gothic archways and balcony railings, momentarily leaving the central statue behind while a lone student crosses the background. The view subsequently returns to the center of the hall, refocusing on the statue and candles as the flow of students steadily increases. Finally, after a brief lateral shift, the scene opens up to reveal a significantly denser crowd filling the atmospheric space.
